subject: ActionSearch.query
truth: ActionSearch.query is now optional instead of required.
quote: fix ActionSearch.query to be optional.

subject: imagegen size enum
truth: The imagegen size enum had a regression that was fixed, meaning the previous set of allowed values may have changed.
quote: fix imagegen `size` enum regression

subject: legacy Python CLI
truth: Stop using the legacy Python CLI; it has been removed.
quote: remove legacy python cli

subject: legacy Python CLI entrypoint
truth: Stop using the old legacy Python CLI entrypoint; it has been renamed.
quote: rename legacy python cli entrypoint

subject: created_at and completed_at types in Response
truth: The created_at and completed_at fields in the Response model have been corrected from int to float — code relying on integer arithmetic or type checks will break.
quote: correct created_at and completed_at to float in Response

subject: timestamp types in Response model
truth: Timestamp types in the Response model have been corrected to int — code relying on float arithmetic or type checks will break.
quote: correct timestamp types to int in Response model

subject: web_search_call.results from ResponseIncludable
truth: Stop including web_search_call.results in ResponseIncludable; it is no longer a valid includable type.
quote: **types:** remove web_search_call.results from ResponseIncludable ([d3cc401](https://github.com/openai/openai-python/commit/d3cc40165cd86015833d15167cc7712b4102f932))

associative: what can I include in response

subject: SDK response types
truth: SDK response types have been aligned with expanded item schemas, which may change the shape of response objects.
quote: align SDK response types with expanded item schemas

subject: endpoint path params
truth: Endpoint path parameters are now sanitized, which may reject or modify previously accepted values.
quote: sanitize endpoint path params

subject: ResponseInputMessageItem type field
truth: The 'type' field in ResponseInputMessageItem is now required instead of optional.
quote: make type required in ResponseInputMessageItem

subject: API key configuration
truth: Stop setting openai.api_key as a module-level variable; instantiate an OpenAI client with the api_key parameter instead.
quote: Module-level `openai.api_key = ...` is replaced by instantiating a client: `client = OpenAI(api_key=...)`.

subject: ChatCompletion.create
truth: Stop calling openai.ChatCompletion.create(); call client.chat.completions.create() on a client instance instead.
quote: `openai.ChatCompletion.create()` is replaced by `client.chat.completions.create()`.

subject: Completion.create
truth: Stop calling openai.Completion.create(); call client.completions.create() on a client instance instead.
quote: `openai.Completion.create()` is replaced by `client.completions.create()`.

subject: Embedding.create
truth: Stop calling openai.Embedding.create(); call client.embeddings.create() on a client instance instead.
quote: `openai.Embedding.create()` is replaced by `client.embeddings.create()`.

subject: Response access style
truth: Stop accessing response fields with dict-style bracket notation; use dot-notation attribute access on the pydantic model instead.
quote: Response access `completion['choices'][0]['text']` (dict) is replaced by `completion.choices[0].text` (pydantic model attribute access).

subject: Serializing response to JSON
truth: Stop using dict() or model_dump() to serialize responses; use model_dump_json() instead.
quote: Serializing the response as a dict is replaced by `completion.model_dump_json(indent=2)`.

subject: InvalidRequestError
truth: Stop catching openai.InvalidRequestError; catch openai.BadRequestError instead.
quote: The error class `openai.InvalidRequestError` is replaced by `openai.BadRequestError`.

subject: Error class namespace
truth: Error classes have moved from the openai.error submodule to the top-level openai namespace; stop importing from openai.error.
quote: Error classes moved from `openai.error` to the top-level `openai` namespace.

subject: embeddings_utils
truth: openai.embeddings_utils has been removed; functionality has moved to the cookbook.
quote: `openai.embeddings_utils` is removed (moved to the cookbook).

subject: Module-level config options
truth: openai.api_key_path, openai.debug, and openai.log have been removed; configure via the client instead.
quote: `openai.api_key_path`, `openai.debug`, and `openai.log` are removed.

subject: Custom session objects
truth: openai.requestssession and openai.aiosession have been removed; the client now uses httpx internally.
quote: `openai.requestssession` and `openai.aiosession` are removed; the client now uses `httpx`.

subject: Chat Completions API
truth: Stop using client.chat.completions.create() and use client.responses.create() instead.
quote: `client.chat.completions.create()` (Chat Completions) is superseded by `client.responses.create()` (Responses API).

subject: API endpoint
truth: Stop using /v1/chat/completions and use /v1/responses instead.
quote: The endpoint `/v1/chat/completions` is replaced by `/v1/responses`.

subject: messages parameter
truth: Stop using the messages parameter and use the input parameter (a string or Items array) instead.
quote: The `messages` parameter is replaced by the `input` parameter (a string or Items array).

subject: system role message
truth: Stop putting system messages in the messages array and use the top-level instructions parameter instead.
quote: A system-role message is replaced by the top-level `instructions` parameter.

subject: output content access
truth: Stop accessing output via choices[0].message.content and use the output_text helper instead.
quote: Output access `choices[0].message.content` is replaced by the `output_text` helper.

subject: response_format parameter
truth: Stop using the response_format parameter and use text.format instead.
quote: The `response_format` parameter is replaced by `text.format`.

subject: n parameter for multiple outputs
truth: Stop using the n parameter; make separate requests for multiple outputs instead.
quote: The `n` parameter for multiple outputs is no longer available in the Responses API; make separate requests instead.

subject: conversation state tracking
truth: Stop manually tracking message arrays and use previous_response_id to chain responses instead.
quote: Manual message-array state tracking is replaced by chaining with `previous_response_id`.

subject: function/tool definition structure
truth: Function/tool definitions now use internal tagging with fields at the top level instead of being nested under a function key.
quote: Function/tool definitions change from external tagging (nested under `function`) to internal tagging (fields at the top level).

subject: function strictness default
truth: Function calling is now strict by default; previously it was non-strict by default.
quote: Function strictness changes from non-strict by default to strict by default.

subject: streaming format
truth: Stop consuming delta chunks from streaming and use typed server-sent events like response.output_text.delta and response.completed instead.
quote: Chat Completions streaming `delta` chunks are replaced by typed server-sent events (`response.output_text.delta`, `response.completed`, etc.).

subject: Assistants API
truth: Stop using the Assistants API; it is deprecated as of August 26, 2025 and will be sunset on August 26, 2026; use the Responses API instead.
quote: The Assistants API is deprecated as of August 26, 2025, with a sunset date of August 26, 2026; use the Responses API instead.
